markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If either team scores a run in the first inning of the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: New York Y vs Boston First Inning Run?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If New York Y and Boston go to extra innings in the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the New York Y vs Boston game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If New York Y wins the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: New York Y vs Boston Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 7:20 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jorbit Vivas records 2+ RBIs in Philadelphia vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jorbit Vivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jorbit Vivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jorbit Vivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Jorbit Vivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Jorbit Vivas: 2+ RBIs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jorbit Vivas records 1+ RBIs in Philadelphia vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jorbit Vivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jorbit Vivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jorbit Vivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Jorbit Vivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
markets.title: Jorbit Vivas: 1+ RBIs?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Yasin Ayari records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Japan vs Sweden professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Japan vs Sweden professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 25, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Yasin Ayari: 1+ assists?

If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Nathan Ake: 1+ assists?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
